tools.name: list_controls
tools.description: List the bearer tenant's active controls (UCF anchors with framework satisfactions joined). Returns canonical control rows.

framework_id.description: Framework filter (NOT YET SUPPORTED in v1 — passing this returns a tool error so callers know the contract; v2 will land per-framework filtering).

limit.description: Result cap; default 100, max 500. Server-side cap is the bigger of these and the platform's own ceiling.

scope.description: Scope cell filter (NOT YET SUPPORTED in v1 — same posture as framework_id).

tools.name: get_control
tools.description: Fetch a single control by UUID or SCF anchor short code. Returns the canonical control row plus its scope and current state.

anchor_id.description: The control identifier. Accepts either the tenant control UUID OR the SCF anchor short code (e.g., "IAC-06"). Required.

tools.name: list_risks
tools.description: List risks from the bearer tenant's risk register. Optional filters: status (treatment), category. RLS scopes to the caller's tenant.

category.description: Filter by risk category (free-form string matching the platform's risk_categories list). Optional.

scope.description: Scope cell filter (NOT YET SUPPORTED in v1; the platform /v1/risks endpoint does not accept a scope query param yet).

status.description: Filter by treatment status: avoid | accept | transfer | mitigate. Optional; default returns all treatments.

tools.name: get_risk
tools.description: Fetch a single risk by UUID. Returns the canonical risk row + linked controls. When the platform's residual-deriver is wired, also returns the derived residual score and per-link effectiveness.

tools.name: list_evidence
tools.description: List evidence records from the bearer tenant's ledger. payload_json is NEVER included in the response (P0-A5). Optional filters: control_id, kind, result.

control_id.description: Filter to evidence records for one control (UUID). Optional; when absent the tool returns the tenant-wide ledger window.

freshness.description: Freshness filter (NOT YET SUPPORTED in v1; the platform /v1/evidence endpoint does not accept a freshness filter). Filter results client-side using observed_at.

tools.name: list_audit_periods
tools.description: List audit periods for the bearer tenant (open / frozen / closed). Includes freeze metadata (frozen_at, frozen_hash, frozen_by) when applicable.

status.description: Filter by audit period status. Optional; default returns all statuses.
